title: hedyotis benguetensis
intro: Hedyotis benguetensis, also known as Benguet hedyotis or Benguet buttonweed, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Philippines, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Hedyotis benguetensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
